message:
fix: consolidate Merge to use applyOverride/mergeEntries from merge.go

Merge() had a hand-rolled implementation that mutated slices during
iteration. Replaced with a call to the more robust applyOverride
(map-based lookup, no mutation) from merge.go. Removed the duplicate
copyConfig in favor of cloneConfig.

Fixes gt-9z56u

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
